016640.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE (numbered best-effort). Disrupted dentition: multiple missing posterior teeth, drifted molars, crowns/bridge near midline. Posterior FDI assignment uncertain. This is the hand-numbering failure mode a trained detector is needed for; the 5-image ceiling test excluded this image.
016713.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE (numbered best-effort). Asymmetric arch, substantial missing/uncertain UPPER teeth: upper-right quadrant largely edentulous and upper anteriors faint; upper-quadrant FDI positions uncertain. Lower arch reliable.

016823.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Heavily restored + partially edentulous: multi-unit bridges/crowns lower-left and right, upper-left largely edentulous, several missing teeth. FDI assignment of the crowned/bridged units is a best-effort guess.
016839.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Multiple implants (upper-left, lower-left) + crowns + missing posterior teeth; dental midline appears shifted. Anterior/posterior FDI positions are approximate best-effort.
016955.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Implant-supported, heavily restored, partially edentulous (multiple lower implant fixtures + crowns/bridges both sides). FDI of the crowned/implant units is approximate best-effort.
017113.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Heavily crowned/bridged anterior segments + missing premolars/molars; collapsed occlusion. Labels are in the right FDI zones (monotonic) but vertical placement on the anterior crowns is approximate.
017118.jpg: MILD LOW CONFIDENCE. Crowned centrals + posterior post/bridge units and a few missing teeth; posterior FDI assignment slightly uncertain but placement is reasonable.
017137.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Restored (upper-right bridge, lower crowns) + sparse/faint upper anteriors and missing teeth. Labels in right FDI zones (monotonic) but some upper-anterior positions are best-effort.
017144.jpg: VERY LOW CONFIDENCE. Near-edentulous: upper arch essentially empty, only ~8 scattered lower teeth remain with large gaps. Labels sit on the visible teeth but the specific FDI numbers assigned are a genuine guess (can't tell which teeth are missing). Only teeth numbered.
017168.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Full-mouth reconstruction: extensive lower full-arch bridge (well-labeled) + a limited upper anterior crown bridge with missing upper posteriors. Some upper posterior labels may fall on edentulous bone (uncertain upper extent).
017204.jpg: MILD LOW CONFIDENCE. Mostly complete; lower-right 3-implant bridge (35-37) and a lower-left crown. Implant-bridge FDI is best-effort but placement is good.
017220.jpg: VERY LOW CONFIDENCE. Severely disrupted/partially edentulous: large gaps both arches, crowns/bridge near upper midline, a lower-left implant fixture, sparse lower anteriors. 017239.jpg: MILD LOW CONFIDENCE. Mostly complete, fairly clean dentition. Restorations: root-canal-treated crowned lower-right molar (46) and a 3-unit lower-left bridge (35-37 best-effort unit FDI). Upper-left 3rd-molar (28) presence and the exact molar count are slightly uncertain; otherwise reliable.
017656.jpg: LOW-MODERATE CONFIDENCE. Partially restored/edentulous: crowned upper-right molar (16), crowned lower-right molar (46), lower-left crown (36) + implant fixture (37); missing upper-left 25 and lower-left molars, missing lower-right 47/48. Upper 3rd molars unerupted/absent (not labeled). Verified anterior/premolar positions against a 2x crop; posterior FDI on the restored/gapped segments is best-effort.
017690.jpg: VERY LOW CONFIDENCE. Full-mouth rehabilitation: multiple implants (bare lower-right fixture 47, two lower-anterior implant crowns 31/32, crown-topped lower-left implant 36), upper crown-bridge + post-crowns, and many missing teeth. This is the hand-numbering failure mode a trained detector is meant for. Labels placed on the visible crowns/implants in monotonic FDI order (verified against 2x crops), but the specific FDI identity of the restored/implant units and gapped segments is a genuine best-effort guess.
018160.jpg: MODERATE CONFIDENCE. Mostly complete; restored (crowned/bridged) posterior molars in BOTH lower quadrants, tilted lower 3rd molars (38 present, 48 absent), and a missing upper-left 25. Positions verified against upper-left + lower 2x crops. FDI of the restored lower-molar units (44-46 right, 35-36 left) is best-effort; anterior/premolar numbering reliable.
018328.jpg: LOW CONFIDENCE. Partially edentulous with drifting: supra-erupted upper molars (upper-right 17 tilted, upper-left 27 supra-erupted), crowned upper central incisors (11/21), a crowned lower-right molar (46), a tilted restored lower-left tooth (33), and a mesially-tilted isolated lower-left molar (37) after a large edentulous gap (34-36 missing). Several missing posteriors. Positions verified against dentition + lower 2x crops, but the specific FDI of the supra-erupted/drifted molars and the gapped segments is a best-effort guess.
018384.jpg: MODERATE CONFIDENCE. Mostly complete with restorations: occlusal fillings on several upper/lower posteriors, a mesially-tilted lower-right molar (47) with 46 missing, a lower-left implant/large crown (labeled 34) with 35 missing, and filled lower-left molars (36/37). Full upper arch (11-17, 21-27) reliable; verified against a lower 2x crop. FDI of the lower-left implant-crown/gapped segment and the tilted lower-right molar (47 vs 48) is best-effort.
018466.jpg: MODERATE CONFIDENCE. Near-complete but heavily restored: full-coverage crowns/bridges on most upper and lower posteriors (and some anteriors), so tooth morphology is hidden. Natural molars at the distal ends (upper 17/26/27, lower 37 + tilted 38). Dental midline shifted slightly left of image center. Positions verified against a 2x crop; because the crowns hide cusp anatomy, the exact FDI of the crowned units is best-effort, though the arch is complete and monotonic.
